positive.prompt: Help me diagnose why this MSBuild build failed using the .binlog file
Trace the MSBuild target execution order from this binary log
I have a build failure in a multi-project dotnet solution, analyze the binlog

negative.prompt: The dotnet build failed, help me recover
Set up a NestJS backend application route

evals.prompt: Analyze the build.binlog file to find which target failed and why.
evals.expected_output: The binlog diagnostics are extracted from the binary log file.
expectations: The binlog MCP server or tool is invoked
Diagnostics are extracted from the binary log file
The root cause target execution failure is pinpointed
A mitigation step is recommended based on log details
